pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/refactor_monolith_to_microservices/setup_task.sh:8-13 recreates /home/ga/legacy_project before writing the task files.

examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/refactor_monolith_to_microservices/task.json:4-5 plus examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/refactor_monolith_to_microservices/export_result.sh:35-43 describe/inspect Compose services named 'app' and 'db'.

examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/refactor_monolith_to_microservices/setup_task.sh:131-133 pre-pulls postgres:15-alpine, task.json:4-5 demands db use postgres:15-alpine, and export_result.sh:45-53 inspects the db container image for names containing 'postgres'.
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/refactor_monolith_to_microservices/task.json:5 describes app reachable at http://localhost:5000 and setup_task.sh:79-80 runs Flask on port 5000.

privileged_info_summary: setup_task.sh rebuilds /home/ga/legacy_project from scratch, writing app.py/requirements/Dockerfile/start_monolith.sh that run a Flask app bound to port 5000 and connect to notes_db, and export_result.sh expects a Compose stack with app/db services where the db uses postgres:15-alpine, so all task data is synthetic and generated locally.
